body.title: [sprint] Inference router: define the caller dimension contract {ticket_tier, builder_tier, domain, urgency, escalation_allowed}
body.intention: I intend that callers specify inference intent as DIMENSIONS (ticket_tier, builder_tier, domain, urgency, escalation_allowed), never a model or provider.
body.description:
Define the caller contract (the dimensions half of D-inference-router-stack-decomposition-2026-07-08). A RouteRequest carries: ticket_tier (work difficulty), builder_tier (requesting worker capability), domain (coding/prose/...), urgency (time eligibility), escalation_allowed (default True). Tiers are A-PRIORI SEEDS for the difficulty envelope, NOT authority.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/rules_engine.py (a RouteRequest dataclass + a tier->difficulty-envelope seed mapping) OR a new small module if cleaner; routing_buckets.py (READ — reuse task_class_to_difficulty / DIFFICULTY_BUCKETS); tests/inference/test_dimensions_contract.py.
**Design rules:** inference-tier-not-model; docs-live-in-code; test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** define the contract + the seed mapping ONLY. New entry surface; route() and _DEFAULT_RULES untouched. Additive.
**Test plan:** RouteRequest accepts the 5 dimensions with escalation_allowed defaulting True; the tier->difficulty-envelope mapping is deterministic (ticket_tier + builder_tier -> a required-difficulty seed); a caller-supplied model/provider is rejected or ignored (contract forbids it). Red before the dataclass exists -> green after.
**Rollback:** remove the dataclass + mapping + test; route() is untouched so live dispatch is unaffected.
**Logging:** log a rejected caller-supplied-model attempt at WARNING (contract violation is a state event).
**Depends on:** none (may run parallel to connections-stack).
**Observability:** a test asserts escalation_allowed=False is honored (pins the walk off) — the determinism lever for later proofs.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
